# Release Notes Template

Use this template when drafting release notes as part of the [Release & Deployment Guide](../octoacme-release-and-deployment.md).

---

## Release: [Release Name / Version]

**Date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
**Release Type:** Patch / Minor / Major
**Release Manager (DRI):** [Name]

---

## Summary
<!-- 2–4 sentence high-level description of what this release delivers and its business impact. -->

## Notable Changes

### ✨ New Features

|---------|-------------|------------|
|         |             |            |

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
| Fix | Description | Issue / PR |
|-----|-------------|------------|
|     |             |            |

### 🔧 Improvements & Maintenance
| Item | Description | Issue / PR |
|------|-------------|------------|
|      |             |            |

### ⚠️ Breaking Changes
<!-- List any breaking changes and required actions for consumers. Leave blank if none. -->
- None

## Migration Steps
<!-- Step-by-step instructions if users/operators need to take action. Leave blank if not applicable. -->
1. Step 1
2. Step 2

| Issue | Severity | Workaround | Expected Fix |

## Rollback Plan
<!-- Reference or brief description of how to roll back this release if needed. -->
See [Rollback & Incident Playbook](../octoacme-release-and-deployment.md#rollback--incident-playbook).

## Stakeholder Announcement
<!-- Draft the brief announcement message for stakeholders / support. -->
> [Project Name] [Release Name] is now live. [One-sentence summary of impact.] For questions, contact [DRI or PM].
